model_policy: Sonnet for mechanical/well-specified tasks, Opus for architectural/cross-cutting judgment
external_parallel_work: Another worker actively churns the validation/ + commands/{mod,validate} hot zone on main. Waves are ordered so my code touches files disjoint from that hot zone first; t5/t6/t8/t10 (which collide) are deferred to Wave 5 and re-checked then. main is dirty intermittently; integrate only during clean windows; never run destructive git ops on main while external work is uncommitted.
operational_notes: GATE RUNS MUST BE SERIALIZED: jit gate pass-all runs ./scripts/cargo-ci.sh (full test suite). The worktree/lease integration tests (e.g. test_worktree_list_excludes_expired_leases) are timing-sensitive and flake under the CPU load of concurrent test suites + shared .git/jit/ lease store. Running 4 in parallel caused a false cargo-ci failure; sequential run passed cargo-ci for all 4. Run gates one worktree at a time.

jit gate check / check-all are INSPECTION-ONLY (show last run). Use jit gate pass / pass-all to EXECUTE auto checkers. Exit code is verdict-meaningful (0 pass, 4 fail, 10 runner error) — do NOT wrap with trailing echo, it masks the exit code.
Per-issue code-review attribution is clean only when run in that issue's own worktree (diff = that issue alone). Confirmed: 3 reworks each cited the correct owning task's code.

waves.note: Mutually file-disjoint AND clear of the external hot zone. Integrates cleanly even with external dirty files present.

issues.title: Typed error variants and downcast for error classification
issues.status: DONE (both gates green at 256c759e after 2 reworks; full string-classification purge; merged to main clean; leak check clean; binary reinstalled). Was FULL PURGE (worktree agent-b9a28509, Opus worker t3-error-class). Bounded core shipped (8fd5a11c: typed IssueNotFoundError/GateNotFoundError both backends, 5 sites downcast, codes 3/3/4). Full-purge groundwork (52ab99aa): InvalidArgumentError(2)+GateAlreadyExistsError(6), State/Priority/ContentFormat/Snapshot FromStr converted, leading typed arms added above retained string fallback. Worker enumerated remainder + an architectural fork; LEAD DECISIONS: (1) Bucket-B internal path guards PRESERVE exit 2 (criterion #3 binding), routed honestly via PathReadError::InvalidPath not shoehorned into InvalidArgumentError. (2) SOLO end-to-end (B overlaps document.rs/json.rs/main.rs with C/D work; fan-out would conflict in the monolith). (C) APPROVED PathReadError classification arm (by variant: NotFound/CommitNotFound->3, InvalidPath->2, OutsideRepoRoot->1, Other->recurse). (D) APPROVED typing not-found family (preset/gate-run/gate-check-registry/lease) preserving exit 3 + route stringified io via PathReadError. Finale: delete string block LAST, prove all codes numerically identical. Criterion 2 then holds literally; NO criterion edit. FINAL DECISIONS: lease not-found -> typed LeaseNotFoundError rendering the full ActionableError text at claim.rs:374,925 (preserve exit 3 + remediation); Bucket-B path guards -> InvalidArgumentError carrying VERBATIM message (preserve exit 2 AND exact text, NOT PathReadError::InvalidPath which would change Display). Governing rule: representation-only refactor, preserve BOTH exit code and message text everywhere. OWNERSHIP (corrected): t3-error-class owns and is finishing solo. LEAD MISJUDGMENT: its idle heartbeats + no new branch commits read as a stall, so I dispatched a duplicate worker t3b-error-purge on the same worktree — but t3 actually had UNCOMMITTED in-progress work (typed not-found family in storage/errors.rs) and flagged the collision before either committed. Stood t3b down (SendMessage halt; TaskStop does not track background agents); t3 reconciles the working tree (baseline = committed 52ab99aa) then finishes per the final spec. LESSON: a branch-commit check misses uncommitted work; query the worker's live status before concluding a stall. COMPLETE: t3 finished solo (HEAD c2fad03d, commits 8fd5a11c/52ab99aa/558563a4/c2fad03d). error_to_exit_code is 100%% downcast-based (zero .contains — independently verified); string block deleted. ValidationFailedError replaces RepositoryIntegrityError (rename swept clean, no residual refs) and also covers the blocked-by-rule write rejection (caught+prevented a 4->1 regression). FromUtf8Error/Utf8Error -> single InvalidArgument downcast arm (preserves exit 2 for ~12 git-output decode sites, zero hot-zone producer churn). Local verify: cargo-ci 2667 passed/0 failed, doctests 387, jit validate exit 0, full before/after exit-code table all-identical. Lead pre-gate review PASS (criteria 1-4 met, scope disciplined, stale-narrative clean). Gate run dispatched (bwxec4jpt, flaky-tolerant).

escalations.question: Archive 'atomic transaction' criterion is infeasible across doc file + N issue JSONs + append-only event log without a WAL; worker delivered referential consistency and documented it honestly; reviewer FAILs on literal wording.
escalations.decision: User chose: amend criterion to referential consistency (no dangling ref, no data loss, no-clobber). Full journaled atomicity stays tracked in f16cfe8c.
escalations.resolution: Amended f067678a success criterion (user-approved). Fixed finding 1 (data-loss clobber) with typed ArchiveError::DestinationOccupied + fail-fast pre-existence check + test. Commits b4168372 (code) + b8230dc8 (.jit) in worktree agent-f067678a.

b9a28509_rework_r2: AT CAP (2/2). R1 fixes verified (ripgrep typed, message-text audit, +3 latent regressions closed). Re-gate on 9b440259: cargo-ci green, code-review FAIL 1 new finding — gate.rs:869 create_gate_preset uses GENERIC NotFoundError (chosen in R1 to preserve the 'Gate not found in registry: {key}' text, which differs from GateNotFoundError::single's wording), violating criterion 1 (gate-not-found must be the DEDICATED typed variant). Flip side of the R1 message fix. R2: add a GateNotFoundError variant (InRegistry) whose Display is byte-identical to that text; use it; audit ALL generic-NotFoundError sites to use dedicated types where one exists. Next distinct finding -> ESCALATE (cap reached). NOTE: t3 amended a commit mid-gate once (d9a29d8e->9b440259, inert +5-line comment); told it to use new commits, not amend, during gates.
b9a28509_rework_r1: cargo-ci green; code-review FAIL (2 legit findings): (1) a 6th string-classification site at main.rs:4354 (search Err handler picks RIPGREP_NOT_FOUND vs SEARCH_FAILED via e.to_string().contains('not installed')) -> type at the rg-spawn origin via io::ErrorKind::NotFound; (2) message-text regression: GateNotFoundError::single Display 'Gate '{0}' not found in registry' != original 'Gate not found in registry: {gate_key}'. Sent rework demanding COMPLETE per-origin message-preservation audit (byte-identical Display to pre-refactor text at every typed origin) + full main.rs string-control-flow grep, to avoid round-by-round churn.
wave1_completed: All 4 issues DONE, both gates green, merged to main (commit de139bc7). t7 took 2 rework rounds (relocation propagation, then TempCleanupFailed test coverage).

blocker.why: Epic 25064508 archival left dangling doc refs; jit validate hard-fails; code-review gate requires validate to pass, so ALL my code-review gates are blocked until this lands.
blocker.decisions: doc-ref-canonical plan resolution (validate reads planning-node plan ref, not the dev/active template); per-doc archive auto-relinks + integrity-checks; dangling refs stay hard-errors (no leniency). Future redesign tracked in f16cfe8c.
blocker.status: RESOLVED + MERGED. f067678a done, both gates green, merged to main (clean, no conflicts); repo-wide jit validate restored (exit 0); installed binary reinstalled from main. Criterion amended to referential consistency (user-approved); clobber data-loss fixed via typed ArchiveError::DestinationOccupied + test. BLOCKER CLEARED.

note_t1: t1 (b22c041e) code verified correct + cargo-ci green; code-review was blocked ONLY by the validate failure. After f067678a merged to main, refreshed the t1 worktree (merged main in, clean), validate now exits 0 there. Re-gating both gates fresh (task bujuhfbh2).
